title: Referred publications 2021
description: You may need to refer to some of these publications and rulings to prepare your 2021 tax return.
keywords: Publication, Publications, Rulings and determinations, TaxPack, Tax return, TaxTime, 2021, referred publications, referred publication

content_blocks.text: To help you complete your 2021 tax return, we have provided a list of other publications that will help you to understand your tax obligations and complete your tax return. Some publications are essential to complete some items.

items: Attribution managed investment trust (AMIT) tax return instructions 2021
Attribution managed investment trust member annual statement and standard distribution statement: guidance notes for trustees 2021
Family trust election, revocation or variation 2021
Franking account tax return and instructions 2021
Guide to foreign income tax offset rules 2021
Personal investors guide to capital gains tax 2021
Refund of franking credit instructions and application for individuals 2021
Refund of franking credits for individuals - application form 2021
Research and development tax incentive schedule 2021
Research and development tax incentive schedule instructions 2021
Self-managed superannuation fund annual return instructions 2021
Strata title body corporate tax return and instructions 2021

content_text:
To help you complete your 2021 tax return, we have provided a list of other publications that will help you to understand your tax obligations and complete your tax return. Some publications are essential to complete some items.
## Popular publications
- Individual tax return instructions
## Publications
- Attribution managed investment trust (AMIT) tax return instructions 2021
- Attribution managed investment trust member annual statement and standard distribution statement: guidance notes for trustees 2021
- Business and professional items 2021
- Capital gains tax (CGT) schedule 2021
- Company tax return 2021
- Company tax return instructions 2021
- Consolidated groups losses schedule 2021
- Consolidated groups losses schedule instructions 2021
- Deductions for prepaid expenses 2021
- Dividend and interest schedule 2021
- Family trust election, revocation or variation 2021
- Film industry incentives 2021
- Foreign income return form guide 2021
- Franking account tax return and instructions 2021

- Individual tax return instructions 2021

- International dealings schedule instructions 2021
- Interposed entity election or revocation 2021
- Life insurance companies taxation schedule 2021

- Losses schedule instructions 2021
- Non-individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2021
- Non-lodgment advice 2021

- You and your shares 2021
